summary: Iteration 21 - P0 Bug Fix Verification: ClaimResponse Pydantic model now correctly returns all adjudication fields (data_tier, tier_label, plan_version, cob_applied, stop_loss_flag, precert_penalty_applied, payment_ready, network_status, idr_case_number, idr_status). All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with Tier, Flags, Docs columns displaying correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test claims during testing for adjudication field verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 verified the P0 fix for missing adjudication fields in ClaimResponse. The fix added ~12 Optional fields to the ClaimResponse Pydantic model in /app/backend/models/schemas.py. Verified fields: data_tier, tier_label, plan_version, cob_applied, stop_loss_flag, precert_penalty_applied, payment_ready, network_status, idr_case_number, idr_status. All claims API endpoints (POST /claims, GET /claims, GET /claims/{id}, POST /claims/{id}/adjudicate, POST /claims/batch) now return these fields. Frontend Claims page displays Tier badges (T1/T2/T3), Flags badges (COB, IDR, SL, PC), and Docs links (EOB/EOP). Dashboard Claims Lifecycle funnel renders correctly. AI Agent and Rx Classification endpoints still functional.

p0_bug_fix_verification.description: ClaimResponse Pydantic model now includes all adjudication fields
fields_verified: plan_version - Plan version used for adjudication
payment_ready - Ready for payment processing flag
idr_case_number - Independent Dispute Resolution case number

endpoints_tested: POST /api/claims - Returns all adjudication fields in response
GET /api/claims - List endpoint returns claims with adjudication fields
GET /api/claims/{claim_id} - Single claim retrieval includes adjudication fields
POST /api/claims/{claim_id}/adjudicate - Adjudication action returns updated fields
POST /api/claims/batch - Batch processing returns results with adjudication fields

components_verified: Claims table with 9 columns: Claim #, Member, Provider, Billed, Paid, Status, Tier, Flags, Docs
Tier badges (T1) displayed for adjudicated claims
Flags badges (IDR) displayed for claims with IDR tracking
EOB/EOP links displayed for approved/paid claims
Funnel shows: Total (32) → Pending (3) → Adjudicated (17) → Paid (12)
Funding Health widget with ASO/Level Funded/Fully Insured breakdown
